rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value limits and has no relation to Educ. Code §33.099, which governs safety of officials at school athletic events. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 33.099. SAFETY OF OFFICIAL. A school district or open-enrollment charter school that holds an extracurricular athletic activity or a University Interscholastic League athletic competition on district or school property shall provide a peace officer, a school resource officer, an administrator, or security personnel to ensure the safety of a referee, judge, or other official of the activity or competition until the official departs district or school property
_note: No conflict. Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
